content:
# elizaos/eliza Daily Update (Jun 7, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
Development on June 7, 2026, focused heavily on the launch of "Eliza Cloud Apps" (Product 2), enabling per-tenant isolated container hosting. Significant progress was made in infrastructure provisioning, cloud API stability, and resolving authentication and routing bugs across the platform.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS

**Eliza Cloud Apps (Product 2) Infrastructure**
*   Implemented per-tenant isolated container hosting, including database isolation, custom URLs, and metered billing ([#8293](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8293)).
*   Added an encryption-free path for tenant cluster admin DSNs to facilitate provisioning without a master key ([#8299](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8299)).
*   Deployed Terraform modules for the apps data-plane and established CI workflows for staging and production ([#8296](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8296), [#8297](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8297)).
*   Added container lifecycle management (PATCH/DELETE/scale) to the Cloud API ([#8270](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8270)).

**Cloud API & SDK Enhancements**
*   Introduced `ElizaCloudClient.transcribeAudio()` to the Cloud SDK for voice/STT support ([#8266](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8266)).
*   Fixed billing cron logic to correctly bill containers when earnings conversion fails ([#8269](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8269)).
*   Resolved authentication issues for WebSockets and EventSource by allowing token passing via query parameters ([#8308](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8308), [#8309](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8309)).

**Platform Stability & Bug Fixes**
*   Addressed UI 404/500 errors by mounting missing routes and bundling the LiFi SDK ([#8320](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8320)).
*   Fixed domain registration logic to prevent charging users for failed stub registrations ([#8291](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8291)).
*   Corrected provisioning daemon issues, including Steward platform-key path integration and agent token expiration limits ([#8301](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8301), [#8303](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8303)).

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
*   **Infrastructure & Cloud:** [#8318](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8318) (Terraform apply fix), [#8312](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8312) (VITE_ENVIRONMENT passthrough), [#8292](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8292) (Provisioning auth fix), [#8289](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8289) (App-auth SDK).
*   **Plugins & Core:** [#8316](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8316) (LifeOps cleanup), [#8302](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8302) (Blackwall guardrail), [#8294](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8294) (Nami signer), [#8298](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8298) (Privy cleanup), [#8290](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8290) (Memory prompt bounds).

## CLOSED ISSUES
*   *No issues were explicitly closed in the provided data.*

## NEW ISSUES
**Eliza Cloud Apps Readiness**
*   [#8321](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/8321): Audit of scaling and ingress gaps required for the Product 2 go-live, specifically regarding per-tenant database and container deployment isolation.

## ACTIVE ISSUES
*   *No active issues with more than 3 comments were reported.*
